name: Gîl-Onyxmeadow
personality: Gîl-Onyxmeadow's shimmering @ eyes absorb stack frames from the propeller-hat seat, spinning through log levels with the focused energy of a capybara who has set `DEBUG=*` and means it. This luminous creature will find your bug and patch it before the incident channel fills up — though it cannot tell you what the system was actually supposed to do.
